| `F-et-018` | `et` | `tools.quote.defaultSize` | capitalization | `"vaikimisi"` | `"Vaikimisi"` | Standalone localizable UI labels capitalize the first word; the lowercase current value is inconsistent in that menu. | verified |
| `F-et-019` | `et` | `tools.code.searchLanguage` | punctuation / search clarity | `"Otsi keelt..."` | `"Otsi keelt…"` | Partitive singular “keelt” is idiomatic here, so plural “keeli” is not an improvement. Only the three-dot punctuation needs replacement with the required ellipsis character. | verified |
| `F-et-020` | `et` | `tools.link.jumpToSection` | terminology / naturalness | `"Mine sektsiooni"` | `"Mine jaotisse"` | “Jaotis” is the established Estonian document-UI term; “sektsioon” is an avoidable loan in this context. | verified |
| `F-et-021` | `et` | `tools.link.linkTitle` | context / terminology | `"Lingi pealkiri"` | `"Lingi tekst"` | “Lingi tekst” names the actual field; “Lingi pealkiri” incorrectly implies a title attribute or document title. | verified |
| `F-et-022` | `et` | `tools.image.altDescription` | terminology / naturalness | `"Lisa alt-tekst, mis kirjeldab pilti. Nii muutub leht ligipääsetavamaks vaegnägijatele ja pimedatele."` | `"Kirjelda seda pilti inimestele, kes seda ei näe."` | It follows the current source’s direct, purpose-led wording without narrowing beneficiaries to diagnoses and retains sentence punctuation. | verified |
| `F-et-023` | `et` | `tools.image.previewControls` | accessibility / specificity | `"Eelvaate juhtnupud"` | `"Pildi eelvaate juhtnupud"` | Adding “Pildi” makes the accessible name self-contained and restores the source scope. | verified |
| `F-et-024` | `et` | `tools.image.errorSourceOffline` | natural error copy | `"Lähtefail võib olla teisaldatud või võrguühenduseta."` | `"Lähtefail võib olla teisaldatud või kättesaamatu."` | A file itself cannot naturally be “võrguühenduseta”. The amendment expresses unavailability without the proposal’s unsupported “enam” (“no longer”) permanence. | verified |
| `F-et-025` | `et` | `tools.image.errorDefaultMessage` | natural error copy | `"URL tagastas vea. Proovi teist allikat või lae fail uuesti üles."` | `"Pilti ei saanud sellelt URL-ilt laadida. Proovi teist allikat või laadi fail uuesti üles."` | It identifies the failed object and source, preserves both recovery options, uses standard “laadi”, and retains required sentence punctuation. | verified |
| `F-et-026` | `et` | `tools.database.viewTypeListDescription` | terminology / naturalness | `"Lihtne lineaarne vaade"` | `"Kuva üksused lihtsas loendis"` | The action-led description restores “items” and “list” and aligns structurally with its sibling view description. | verified |
| `F-et-027` | `et` | `tools.bookmark.loading` | terminology / naturalness | `"Eelvaate laadimine"` | `"Lingi eelvaate laadimine…"` | It restores the source object “link” and uses the standard no-space ellipsis for ongoing work. | verified |
| `F-et-028` | `et` | `tools.embed.empty` | context / read-only state | `"Manustamiseks kleebi link"` | `"Manustamislink puudub"` | A read-only empty state must report absence, not instruct the user to paste a link they cannot enter. | verified |
| `F-et-029` | `et` | `tools.linkPaste.mention` | terminology / naturalness | `"Mainimine"` | `"Maini"` | The imperative “Maini” names the action; the noun “Mainimine” names an activity and is inconsistent with command labels. | verified |
| `F-et-030` | `et` | `tools.file.previewRender` | context / terminology | `"Vaade"` | `"Eelvaade"` | “Eelvaade” precisely translates Preview and matches established Estonian UI terminology. | verified |
| `F-et-031` | `et` | `tools.video.alignmentLeft` | context / control terminology | `"Vasak"` | `"Joonda vasakule"` | The imperative exactly expresses “Align left” and matches official Estonian alignment commands. | verified |
| `F-et-032` | `et` | `tools.video.alignmentCenter` | context / control terminology | `"Keskel"` | `"Joonda keskele"` | The imperative exactly expresses “Align center”; locative “Keskel” only describes a state. | verified |
| `F-et-033` | `et` | `tools.video.alignmentRight` | context / control terminology | `"Parem"` | `"Joonda paremale"` | The imperative exactly expresses “Align right” and matches official Estonian alignment commands. | verified |
| `F-et-034` | `et` | `tools.audio.alignmentLeft` | context / control terminology | `"Vasak"` | `"Joonda vasakule"` | The imperative exactly expresses “Align left” and keeps audio and video controls aligned. | verified |
| `F-et-035` | `et` | `tools.audio.alignmentCenter` | context / control terminology | `"Keskel"` | `"Joonda keskele"` | The imperative exactly expresses “Align center”; locative “Keskel” only describes a state. | verified |
| `F-et-036` | `et` | `tools.audio.alignmentRight` | context / control terminology | `"Parem"` | `"Joonda paremale"` | The imperative exactly expresses “Align right” and keeps audio and video controls aligned. | verified |
| `F-et-037` | `et` | `tools.audio.coverSourceAria` | accessibility / specificity | `"Pildi allikas"` | `"Kaanepildi allikas"` | “Kaanepildi” supplies the missing object and distinguishes this control from unrelated image-source fields. | verified |
| `F-et-038` | `et` | `a11y.allBlocksSelected` | accessibility / number | `"Kõik plokid valitud, {count} plokki"` | `"Kõik plokid valitud. Kokku: {count}"` | The label-first count avoids “1 plokki”, preserves {count}, and separates the complete status statements with correct punctuation. | verified |
| `F-et-039` | `et` | `a11y.navigatedToBlock` | accessibility / terminology | `"Liikuti plokile"` | `"Liiguti plokile"` | “Liikuti” is not the past impersonal form of liikuma; “Liiguti” fixes the spelling and inflection. | verified |
| `F-et-040` | `et` | `notifier.dismiss` | action semantics | `"Loobu"` | `"Sulge"` | “Sulge” names closing the notification; “Loobu” means abandoning or giving something up and mislabels the control. | verified |
| `F-et-041` | `et` | `tools.video.seek` | accessibility / interactive media terminology | `"Keri"` | `"Video ajaskaala"` | The real caller is an interactive range that seeks playback, not scrolling or a passive progress bar. The earlier intermediate `Video kerimisriba` and follow-up proposal `Video edenemisriba` therefore remained inaccurate. Microsoft’s localized video-player guidance uses [`video ajaskaala`](https://support.microsoft.com/et-ee/office/videote-trimmimine-microsoft-stream-c41f21f5-e803-4dbf-99a6-65452003a1ee); the native slider role supplies the interaction. | verified |
| `F-et-042` | `et` | `tools.video.toggleTimeDisplay` | accessibility / state clarity | `"Lülita ajanäit"` | `"Vaheta möödunud ja järelejäänud aja vahel"` | It identifies both states and the switching action; generic “Lülita ajanäit” does not tell assistive-technology users what changes. | verified |
| `F-et-043` | `et` | `tools.video.ctxCopyUrlAtTime` | context / playback terminology | `"Kopeeri video URL praegusel ajal"` | `"Kopeeri video URL praegusest taasesituskohast"` | The current “praegusel ajal” means “nowadays”. Adding “taasesitus” to the proposal’s ambiguous “esituskoht” makes the referenced playback position explicit. | verified |
| `F-et-044` | `et` | `tools.video.ctxStats` | terminology / tone | `"Statistika asjatundjatele"` | `"Esitusstatistika"` | It replaces obsolete “statistics for experts” wording with the neutral current Playback statistics contract and matches the locale’s established media term “Esituskiirus”. | verified |
| `F-et-045` | `et` | `tools.callout.emojiSearchResults` | terminology / naturalness | `"Leiti {count} emojit"` | `"Emojivasteid: {count}"` | The label-first partitive form preserves “matches” while avoiding the invalid “1 emojit” rendering for arbitrary counts; {count} remains exact. | verified |
| `F-et-046` | `et` | `a11y.dragStarted` | accessibility / impersonal state announcement | `"Lohistab plokki"` | `"Plokki lohistatakse"` | The old third-person form implies an unstated actor. The impersonal form naturally foregrounds the block's drag state in a system announcement, following [EKI guidance](https://teatmik.eki.ee/teatmik/umbisikuline-tegumood-ja-poolt-tarind/). | verified |
| `F-et-047` | `et` | `a11y.dragStartedMultiple` | accessibility / impersonal state announcement / number | `"Lohistab {count} plokki"` | `"Lohistatakse {count} plokki"` | The caller selects this key only above one. The impersonal form fits a live-region announcement, and the numeral-governed singular partitive `plokki` follows [EKI number guidance](https://teatmik.eki.ee/teatmik/arvukirjutus/). | verified |
| `F-et-048` | `et` | `a11y.dropPosition` | accessibility / spoken numeric relation | `"Asetatakse positsioonile {position}/{total}"` | `"Asetatakse positsioonile {position}, kokku {total}"` | `Kokku` makes the aggregate explicit for speech and avoids the slash's ambiguous relationship while preserving both placeholders. The separately confirmed caller-level numeric defect cannot be corrected in translation. | verified |
| `F-et-049` | `et` | `a11y.blockMoved` | accessibility / spoken numeric relation | `"Plokk teisaldatud positsioonile {position}/{total}"` | `"Plokk teisaldatud positsioonile {position}, kokku {total}"` | The explicit aggregate reads naturally in a completion announcement and matches the existing Estonian moved-up and moved-down wording. | verified |
| `F-et-050` | `et` | `a11y.navigationModeEntered` | accessibility / localized key terminology | `"Navigeerimisrežiim. Kasuta nooleklahve plokkide vahel liikumiseks, Enterit muutmiseks ja Escape'i väljumiseks."` | `"Navigeerimisrežiim. Kasuta nooleklahve plokkide vahel liikumiseks, muutmiseks sisestusklahvi (Enter) ja väljumiseks paoklahvi (Esc)."` | The standard localized key names make the instruction natural, while the parenthetical legends preserve recognition of the physical keys. Official Microsoft accessibility copy uses the same [`sisestusklahvi (Enter)` and `paoklahvi (Esc)`](https://support.microsoft.com/et-ee/accessibility/teams/basic-tasks-using-a-screen-reader-with-microsoft-teams) forms. | verified |
| `F-et-051` | `et` | `a11y.navigationPosition` | accessibility / spoken numeric relation | `"{tool}, {position}/{total}"` | `"{tool}, positsioon {position}, kokku {total}"` | The replacement explicitly labels both the ordinal and aggregate values while remaining concise for a throttled repeated live-region announcement. | verified |
| `F-et-052` | `et` | `tools.video.caption` | media-neutral terminology | `"Pildiallkiri"` | `"Pealdis"` | The editable text belongs to video, not a still picture. Official localized [LibreOffice help](https://help.libreoffice.org/latest/et/text/swriter/01/04060000.html) uses the generic UI term `Pealdis`. | verified |
| `F-et-053` | `et` | `tools.video.toggleCaption` | media-neutral terminology / source-only coverage | `"Näita või peida pildiallkiri"` | `"Näita või peida pealdis"` | The source-only contract has no production caller at this revision, but it should retain the same media-neutral caption terminology as the active video and audio fields. | verified |
| `F-et-054` | `et` | `tools.audio.caption` | media-neutral terminology | `"Pildiallkiri"` | `"Pealdis"` | `Pildiallkiri` is image-specific and especially inapt for author text under an audio card. `Pealdis` is the established generic caption term and matches the existing Estonian placeholder. | verified |
| `F-et-055` | `et` | `tools.video.seekValueText` | accessibility / spoken numeric relation | `"{current} / {total}"` | `"{current}, kokku {total}"` | The media slider exposes formatted current and maximum times as `aria-valuetext`; the explicit aggregate is clearer in speech than a slash and preserves both placeholders. | verified |
| `F-fa-003` | `fa` | `blockSettings.clickAction` | composed UI grammar | `"کلیک کنید"` | `"با کلیک"` | As a prefix fragment it supplies the shared instrumental phrase and composes into a natural imperative in both caller forms. | verified |
| `F-fa-004` | `fa` | `blockSettings.orConjunction` | composed UI grammar | `" یا از این میان‌بر استفاده کنید: "` | `" یا میان‌بر "` | The coordinated noun phrase is grammatical under the shared «با» and preserves the caller-required leading and trailing ASCII spaces. | verified |
| `F-fa-005` | `fa` | `blockSettings.openMenuAction` | composed UI grammar | `" برای باز کردن منو"` | `" منو را باز کنید"` | This suffix supplies the imperative predicate for both composed tooltips and preserves its required leading ASCII space. | verified |
| `F-fa-006` | `fa` | `blockSettings.dragToMove` | orthography / instruction clarity | `"برای جابجایی بکشید"` | `"برای جابه‌جایی بکشید"` | The proposal corrects the standard spelling with a ZWNJ without changing the concise drag instruction. | verified |
| `F-fa-007` | `fa` | `toolbox.optionAddAbove` | shortcut / instruction clarity | `"Option-کلیک برای افزودن در بالا"` | `"برای افزودن در بالا، کلید Option را نگه دارید و کلیک کنید"` | It renders modifier-click as a complete Persian instruction while retaining the literal key name required by the UI. | verified |
| `F-fa-008` | `fa` | `toolbox.ctrlAddAbove` | shortcut / instruction clarity | `"Ctrl-کلیک برای افزودن در بالا"` | `"برای افزودن در بالا، کلید Ctrl را نگه دارید و کلیک کنید"` | It matches attested Persian modifier-click syntax and keeps Ctrl unchanged as a keyboard label. | verified |
| `F-fa-009` | `fa` | `toolNames.bold` | established formatting terminology | `"ضخیم"` | `"پررنگ"` | «پررنگ» is the attested formatting command; «ضخیم» describes physical thickness. | verified |
| `F-fa-010` | `fa` | `tools.marker.textColor` | terminology / specificity | `"متن"` | `"رنگ نوشتار"` | The current value omits color, but the official Persian UI label is the more precise and directly attested «رنگ نوشتار». | verified |
| `F-fa-011` | `fa` | `tools.paragraph.placeholder` | instruction clarity | `"چیزی بنویسید یا / را برای انتخاب بزنید"` | `"چیزی بنویسید یا برای انتخاب ابزار، کلید / را فشار دهید"` | It restores the omitted object «ابزار» and uses explicit keyboard-action wording around the literal slash key. | verified |
| `F-fa-012` | `fa` | `tools.table.clearSelection` | context / action accuracy | `"پاک کردن"` | `"پاک کردن محتوا"` | The added object distinguishes clearing cell contents from deleting the selected rows, columns, or cells. | verified |
| `F-fa-013` | `fa` | `tools.table.comfortableText` | context / mode terminology | `"متن راحت"` | `"متن معمولی"` | The comfortable mode only restores the regular editor font size; it does not increase spacing, so the input proposal would misdescribe behavior. | verified |
| `F-fa-014` | `fa` | `tools.table.placement` | context / control terminology | `"موقعیت"` | `"تراز"` | The picker controls horizontal and vertical alignment, for which «تراز» is the exact UI category rather than generic position. | verified |
| `F-fa-015` | `fa` | `a11y.dragHandle` | accessibility / clarity | `"برای جابجایی بلوک بکشید یا برای منو کلیک کنید"` | `"برای جابه‌جایی بلوک بکشید یا برای باز کردن منو کلیک کنید"` | It fixes standard orthography and states the click action as opening, not merely being 'for', the menu. | verified |
| `F-fa-016` | `fa` | `a11y.searchResults` | accessibility / number | `"{count} نتیجه"` | `"نتایج جستجو: {count}"` | It restores the search context for screen-reader announcements and preserves the {count} placeholder exactly once. | verified |
| `F-fa-017` | `fa` | `a11y.navigationModeEntered` | accessibility / clarity | `"حالت پیمایش. برای جابجایی بین بلوک‌ها از کلیدهای جهت‌نما، برای ویرایش از Enter و برای خروج از Escape استفاده کنید."` | `"حالت پیمایش. برای جابه‌جایی بین بلوک‌ها از کلیدهای جهت‌نما، برای ویرایش از Enter و برای خروج از Escape استفاده کنید."` | This is a narrowly justified orthographic correction to standard «جابه‌جایی»; key names remain literal. | verified |
| `F-fa-018` | `fa` | `tools.callout.addEmoji` | source synchronization / terminology | `"افزودن ایموجی"` | `"افزودن نماد"` | The button adds the callout's icon slot; reducing it to emoji conflicts with the broader source label and caller role. | verified |
| `F-fa-019` | `fa` | `tools.callout.filterEmojis` | search clarity / terminology | `"جستجو…"` | `"جستجوی ایموجی‌ها…"` | The picker-specific object is required to distinguish this field from generic search, and the Unicode ellipsis matches the source. | verified |
| `F-fa-020` | `fa` | `tools.callout.pickRandom` | action clarity | `"تصادفی"` | `"انتخاب یک ایموجی تصادفی"` | It turns an ambiguous adjective into the actual picker action and object. | verified |
| `F-fa-021` | `fa` | `tools.code.searchLanguage` | number / punctuation | `"جستجوی زبان..."` | `"جستجوی زبان‌ها…"` | It correctly pluralizes the searchable collection and replaces three ASCII periods with the source's Unicode ellipsis. | verified |
| `F-fa-022` | `fa` | `tools.link.linkTitle` | context / terminology | `"عنوان پیوند"` | `"متن پیوند"` | The field edits visible linked text, not a title attribute, so the proposal matches the caller's semantics. | verified |
| `F-fa-023` | `fa` | `tools.image.alignmentLeftAria` | context / control terminology | `"تراز از چپ"` | `"تراز چپ"` | The current preposition is wrong, but the official Persian formatting command is the exact, shorter «تراز چپ». | verified |
| `F-fa-024` | `fa` | `tools.image.alignmentCenterAria` | context / control terminology | `"تراز از وسط"` | `"تراز به مرکز"` | It replaces the incorrect source-direction construction with the exact attested Persian center-alignment label. | verified |
| `F-fa-025` | `fa` | `tools.image.alignmentRightAria` | context / control terminology | `"تراز از راست"` | `"تراز راست"` | The current preposition is wrong, but the official Persian formatting command is the exact, shorter «تراز راست». | verified |
| `F-fa-026` | `fa` | `tools.image.downloadOriginal` | terminology / naturalness | `"دانلود اصلی"` | `"دانلود نسخهٔ اصلی"` | Adding «نسخهٔ» makes original unambiguously modify the downloadable version rather than the action. | verified |
| `F-fa-027` | `fa` | `tools.image.altDescription` | accessibility / source synchronization | `"متن جایگزین برای توصیف این تصویر اضافه کنید. این کار صفحه را برای افراد کم‌بینا یا نابینا دسترس‌پذیرتر می‌کند."` | `"این تصویر را برای افرادی که نمی‌توانند آن را ببینند توصیف کنید."` | It faithfully translates the concise helper instruction without inventing a second sentence or narrowing the audience. | verified |
| `F-fa-028` | `fa` | `tools.image.errorDefaultMessage` | natural error copy | `"URL خطا برگرداند. منبع دیگری را امتحان کنید یا فایل را دوباره بارگذاری کنید."` | `"تصویر از این نشانی وب بارگیری نشد. منبع دیگری را امتحان کنید یا فایل را دوباره بارگذاری کنید."` | It attributes the failure to image loading, not an asserted HTTP error, and uses native URL terminology. | verified |
| `F-fa-029` | `fa` | `tools.image.cropRatio1to1` | locale numerals / notation | `"1:1"` | `"۱:۱"` | Persian digits match the locale's static-number convention; the colon and numeric order remain intact. | verified |
| `F-fa-030` | `fa` | `tools.image.cropRatio4to3` | locale numerals / notation | `"4:3"` | `"۴:۳"` | The exact Persian-digit ۴:۳ ratio is attested in an official Persian camera interface. | verified |
| `F-fa-031` | `fa` | `tools.image.cropRatio16to9` | locale numerals / notation | `"16:9"` | `"۱۶:۹"` | The exact Persian-digit ۱۶:۹ ratio is attested in an official Persian camera interface. | verified |
| `F-fa-032` | `fa` | `tools.audio.titlePlaceholder` | media terminology | `"عنوان آهنگ"` | `"عنوان قطعه"` | «قطعه» covers an audio track without assuming it is a song and is attested in official Persian media UI. | verified |
| `F-fa-033` | `fa` | `tools.audio.coverChange` | established media terminology | `"تغییر کاور"` | `"تغییر جلدنگاره"` | «جلدنگاره» is native, current official Persian consumer terminology for music cover art, not an invented calque. | verified |
| `F-fa-034` | `fa` | `tools.audio.coverSet` | established media terminology | `"تنظیم تصویر کاور"` | `"تنظیم جلدنگاره"` | The native attested media term fully carries 'cover image' and keeps this action consistent with the cover controls. | verified |
| `F-fa-035` | `fa` | `tools.audio.coverRemove` | established media terminology | `"حذف کاور"` | `"حذف جلدنگاره"` | It uses the same native, attested cover-art noun as the adjacent add, set, and change actions. | verified |
| `F-fa-036` | `fa` | `tools.audio.coverAdd` | established media terminology | `"افزودن کاور"` | `"افزودن جلدنگاره"` | It replaces unnecessary transliteration with current official Persian music-cover terminology. | verified |
| `F-fa-037` | `fa` | `tools.database.duplicateView` | action semantics | `"تکرار"` | `"تکثیر"` | The menu creates a copy of the view; «تکثیر» names duplication while «تکرار» means repetition. | verified |
| `F-fa-038` | `fa` | `tools.database.viewTypeListDescription` | context / source synchronization | `"نمای خطی ساده"` | `"موارد را در یک فهرست ساده نمایش دهید"` | The input proposal restores meaning but remains a noun phrase; the final imperative matches the source and the sibling board-view description. | verified |
| `F-fa-039` | `fa` | `tools.bookmark.loading` | progress clarity / punctuation | `"در حال بارگذاری پیش‌نمایش"` | `"در حال بارگذاری پیش‌نمایش پیوند…"` | It restores the link object and the source's Unicode ellipsis in a visible asynchronous status. | verified |
| `F-fa-040` | `fa` | `tools.bookmark.error` | natural error copy | `"بارگذاری پیش‌نمایش ناموفق بود"` | `"پیش‌نمایش پیوند بارگذاری نشد"` | It identifies the failed object as the link preview and states the load failure directly. | verified |
| `F-fa-041` | `fa` | `tools.embed.empty` | context / read-only state | `"برای جاسازی، پیوند را بچسبانید"` | `"پیوندی برای جاسازی وجود ندارد"` | The read-only empty state reports absence; the current imperative falsely asks the user to paste into a non-editable state. | verified |
| `F-fa-042` | `fa` | `tools.embed.captionPlaceholder` | instruction grammar | `"نوشتن زیرنویس…"` | `"زیرنویسی بنویسید…"` | The editable placeholder becomes a direct instruction and retains the Unicode ellipsis. | verified |
| `F-fa-043` | `fa` | `tools.linkPaste.mention` | established product terminology | `"منشن"` | `"نامبری"` | «نامبری» is attested official Persian product language and fits the noun-form paste-menu item; preference alone does not justify retaining the transliteration. | verified |
| `F-fa-044` | `fa` | `tools.video.seek` | accessibility / control terminology | `"پیمایش"` | `"موقعیت پخش"` | The string labels a playback-position slider; generic navigation «پیمایش» is semantically wrong. | verified |
| `F-fa-045` | `fa` | `tools.video.toggleTimeDisplay` | accessibility / state clarity | `"تغییر نمایش زمان"` | `"تغییر بین زمان سپری‌شده و زمان باقی‌مانده"` | It exposes both states of the toggle, which the generic current label hides. | verified |
| `F-fa-046` | `fa` | `tools.video.mute` | action morphology | `"بی‌صدا"` | `"بی‌صدا کردن"` | An interactive button needs action morphology; «بی‌صدا کردن» is also the official Persian player command. | verified |
| `F-fa-047` | `fa` | `tools.video.unmute` | action morphology | `"باصدا"` | `"باصدا کردن"` | The proposal has action morphology, but «باصدا کردن» is the exact official counterpart to «بی‌صدا کردن» and forms the tighter state pair. | verified |
| `F-fa-048` | `fa` | `tools.video.ctxStats` | terminology / tone | `"آمار تخصصی"` | `"آمار پخش"` | The context-menu item displays playback metrics; «تخصصی» invents an unsupported 'advanced/specialist' meaning. | verified |
| `F-fa-049` | `fa` | `tools.audio.mute` | action morphology | `"بی‌صدا"` | `"بی‌صدا کردن"` | The audio control is an action button, so the attested infinitive command is required rather than an adjectival state. | verified |
| `F-fa-050` | `fa` | `tools.audio.unmute` | action morphology | `"باصدا"` | `"باصدا کردن"` | The exact official player action «باصدا کردن» pairs morphologically and semantically with «بی‌صدا کردن». | verified |
| `F-fa-051` | `fa` | `tools.audio.coverSourceAria` | accessibility / specificity | `"منبع تصویر"` | `"منبع جلدنگاره"` | This is the accessible label for the cover picker's source selector; the current value loses the cover scope and conflicts with the accepted cover terminology. | verified |
| `F-fa-052` | `fa` | `tools.video.ctxCopyUrlAtTime` | context / playback terminology | `"کپی نشانی ویدیو در زمان فعلی"` | `"کپی نشانی ویدیو از موقعیت فعلی پخش"` | The action appends a #t fragment from video.currentTime; «در زمان فعلی» can mean 'now', while the proposal names the playback position. | verified |
| `F-fa-053` | `fa` | `notifier.dismiss` | action semantics | `"رد کردن"` | `"بستن"` | The × control closes a toast; «رد کردن» means reject, whereas «بستن» names the implemented action. | verified |
| `F-fil-003` | `fil` | `tools.marker.textColor` | terminology / specificity | `"Teksto"` | `"Kulay ng teksto"` | The first correction restored the missing color axis. A fresh complete review found the remaining isolated English `text` inconsistent with this locale's native `teksto` family; the independent challenge accepted `Kulay ng teksto` for the shared visible and composed labels. | verified |
| `F-fil-004` | `fil` | `tools.marker.background` | terminology / specificity | `"Likuran"` | `"Kulay ng background"` | The value labels background-color controls, not a physical rear surface. Filipino Gmail uses the exact UI term “Kulay ng background.” | verified |
| `F-fil-005` | `fil` | `tools.colorPicker.defaultSwatchLabel` | accessibility / composed-label grammar | `"{mode} {default}"` | `"{mode}: {default}"` | With the accepted axis terms, the caller emits “Kulay ng text: Karaniwan” and equivalent labels. The colon cleanly marks property:value and avoids the current bare noun pile while preserving both placeholders. | verified |
| `F-fil-006` | `fil` | `tools.colorPicker.colorSwatchLabel` | accessibility / composed-label grammar | `"{mode} {color}"` | `"{mode}: {color}"` | The caller emits labels such as “Kulay ng text: Pula.” The colon is natural compact UI punctuation and preserves both independently substituted placeholders. | verified |
| `F-fil-007` | `fil` | `tools.table.placement` | context / control terminology | `"Posisyon"` | `"Pag-align"` | The concrete child control chooses one of nine cell-content alignments. “Pag-align” names that operation and matches both the live locale’s image controls and official Filipino alignment terminology. | verified |
| `F-fil-008` | `fil` | `tools.table.clearSelection` | context / action accuracy | `"I-clear"` | `"I-clear ang content"` | Both concrete handlers clear cell contents while retaining cells and formatting. “I-clear ang content” identifies the object and follows attested Filipino Google action phrasing. | verified |
| `F-fil-009` | `fil` | `a11y.searchResults` | accessibility / number | `"{count} (na) resulta"` | `"Resulta ng paghahanap: {count}"` | The current literal “(na)” alternative is not speakable production text and omits search. “Resulta ng paghahanap: {count}” is a concise count label with the exact placeholder. | verified |
| `F-fil-010` | `fil` | `a11y.allBlocksSelected` | accessibility / number | `"Napili ang lahat ng block, {count} block"` | `"Napili ang lahat ng block. The proposed two-sentence form separates selection state from the neutral total and removes the stale repeated noun. | verified |
| `F-fil-011` | `fil` | `a11y.dragStartedMultiple` | accessibility / number | `"Dina-drag ang {count} na mga block"` | `"Dina-drag ang {count} block"` | AMEND: a fixed `na` cannot agree with every number represented by `{count}`; Filipino linkers vary with the spoken numeral. | `F-fil-012` | `fil` | `a11y.blocksMoved` | accessibility / number | `"{count} na mga block ang inilipat sa posisyon {position}"` | `"{count} block ang inilipat sa posisyon {position}"` | AMEND: `{count} na block` hard-codes a linker whose form depends on the spoken numeral. | `F-fil-013` | `fil` | `a11y.blocksDuplicated` | accessibility / number | `"{count} na mga block ang na-duplicate simula sa posisyon {position}"` | `"{count} block ang na-duplicate simula sa posisyon {position}"` | AMEND: the proposal fixes redundant `mga` but leaves an invariant linker after a variable numeral. | `F-fil-014` | `fil` | `searchTerms.bullet` | search alias / false friend | `"bala"` | `"bullet"` | “Bala” denotes ammunition, not a list marker. | `F-fil-015` | `fil` | `searchTerms.collapse` | search alias / terminology | `"ipisa"` | `"itiklop"` | This is a localized search alias for a collapsible toggle list. “Ipisa” means crush/squeeze; “itiklop” supplies the intended fold/collapse search concept. | verified |
| `F-fil-016` | `fil` | `toolNames.quote` | terminology / content scope | `"Panipi"` | `"Sipi"` | The toolbox title names a quotation block. KWF usage distinguishes `sipi` (quoted passage) from `panipi` (quotation-mark punctuation), so “Sipi” is the correct product noun. | verified |
| `F-fil-017` | `fil` | `searchTerms.quote` | search alias / false friend | `"panipi"` | `"sipi"` | The search alias targets quotation content, not quotation marks. KWF’s `sipi`/`panipi` distinction directly supports “sipi.” | verified |

| `F-fil-019` | `fil` | `tools.quote.placeholder` | terminology / content scope | `"Panipi"` | `"Sipi"` | The editable field asks for quotation content. “Sipi” is the KWF-supported content noun; “Panipi” names punctuation. | verified |

| `F-fil-037` | `fil` | `tools.database.propertyTypeMultiSelect` | grammar / property terminology | `"Maramihang piliin"` | `"Maramihang pagpili"` | The property-type picker requires a noun. “Pagpili” names selection; current “piliin” is an imperative verb. | verified |
| `F-fil-038` | `fil` | `tools.embed.empty` | context / read-only state | `"Mag-paste ng link para i-embed"` | `"Walang naka-embed na link"` | The caller reaches this key only in the read-only empty branch, where paste is unavailable. “Walang naka-embed na link” describes that state instead of issuing an impossible command. | verified |
| `F-fil-039` | `fil` | `tools.video.toggleTimeDisplay` | accessibility / state clarity | `"I-toggle ang display ng oras"` | `"Lumipat sa pagitan ng oras na lumipas at oras na natitira"` | AMEND: the proposal leaves `lumipas` without its required noun/linker phrase. | `F-fil-040` | `fil` | `a11y.dropPosition` | accessibility / morphology / direction-neutral prospective action | `"Ibibaba sa posisyon {position} ng {total}"` | `"Ilalagay sa posisyon {position} sa kabuuang {total}"` | The live caller announces an arbitrary prospective drop target above or below and can carry one or multiple blocks. `Ibibaba` is malformed for contemplated `ibababa` and still means lowering; direction-neutral `Ilalagay` preserves both placeholders and the future action. Sources: [DragA11y caller](../../src/components/modules/drag/a11y/DragA11y.ts), [KWF — baba](https://kwfdiksiyonaryo.ph/?query=baba), [KWF — lagay](https://kwfdiksiyonaryo.ph/?query=lagay). | verified |
| `F-fil-041` | `fil` | `tools.code.searchLanguage` | punctuation / source synchronization | `"Maghanap ng wika..."` | `"Maghanap ng wika…"` | The searchable programming-language picker uses this value as both placeholder and accessible label. | `F-fil-042` | `fil` | `tools.bookmark.loading` | context / ongoing state / punctuation | `"Nilo-load ang preview"` | `"Nilo-load ang preview ng link…"` | The asynchronous bookmark unfurl replaces the whole placeholder while fetching metadata for a pasted URL. `ng link` restores the source object and distinguishes this state from other preview families; the ellipsis marks ongoing work. The independent challenge kept the exact proposal. | verified |
| `F-fil-043` | `fil` | `tools.video.ctxStats` | terminology / caller context | `"Mga detalyadong stat"` | `"Mga istatistika ng pag-playback"` | The video context-menu action opens playback resolution, frame, buffer, and viewport measurements. | `F-fil-045` | `fil` | `toolNames.strikethrough` | terminology / control clarity | `"May guhit"` | `"Guhit sa gitna"` | The compact inline control needs a distinct name for a line through text. `May guhit` is ambiguous (“has a line” or “striped”), while the placement-specific replacement contrasts with `Salungguhit`; official Filipino WordPress and LibreOffice terminology independently describes the through-text operation. | verified |
| `F-fil-046` | `fil` | `tools.code.wrapLines` | terminology / source-only contract | `"Ibalot ang mga linya"` | `"I-wrap ang mga linya"` | `Ibalot` describes physical wrapping or packaging. | `F-fil-090` | `fil` | `tools.table.placementTopRight` | spatial grammar / placement family | `"Itaas kanan"` | `"Kanan sa itaas"` | The accepted Filipino order names the horizontal side before its vertical relation and closes the top-row placement family. | verified |
| `F-fil-091` | `fil` | `tools.table.placementMiddleLeft` | spatial grammar / placement family | `"Gitna kaliwa"` | `"Kaliwa sa gitna"` | The accepted relation is natural Filipino rather than a literal English-order pair and precisely names the middle-left picker cell. | verified |
| `F-fil-092` | `fil` | `tools.table.placementMiddleRight` | spatial grammar / placement family | `"Gitna kanan"` | `"Kanan sa gitna"` | The accepted relation mirrors `Kaliwa sa gitna` and leaves the already-correct center-only label `Gitna` unchanged. | verified |
| `F-fil-093` | `fil` | `tools.table.placementBottomLeft` | spatial grammar / placement family | `"Ibaba kaliwa"` | `"Kaliwa sa ibaba"` | The accepted relational construction replaces the telegraphic English order and closes the lower-left picker label. | verified |
| `F-fil-094` | `fil` | `tools.table.placementBottomCenter` | spatial grammar / placement family | `"Ibaba gitna"` | `"Gitna sa ibaba"` | The accepted compact label naturally identifies the horizontal center within the bottom band. | verified |
| `F-fil-095` | `fil` | `tools.table.placementBottomRight` | spatial grammar / placement family | `"Ibaba kanan"` | `"Kanan sa ibaba"` | The accepted relation mirrors the other bottom-row labels and completes a grammatical, symmetric placement family. | verified |
| `F-fil-096` | `fil` | `searchTerms.pre` | Taglish orthography / search alias | `"nakaformat"` | `"naka-format"` | The Filipino prefix attaches to an unchanged English technical root with a hyphen. [Google Keep's Filipino documentation](https://support.google.com/keep/answer/2888246?co=GENIE.Platform%3DDesktop&hl=fil) repeatedly uses exact `naka-format`. | verified |
| `F-fil-097` | `fil` | `tools.image.viewFullscreen` | action grammar / media terminology | `"Tingnan nang fullscreen"` | `"Tingnan sa full screen"` | `nang fullscreen` is the wrong relation for entering a display mode. The accepted locative command matches the established Filipino media-control family. | verified |
| `F-fil-098` | `fil` | `tools.image.exitFullscreen` | media terminology / family consistency | `"Lumabas sa fullscreen"` | `"Lumabas sa full screen"` | The accepted spelling matches the identical video exit action and [YouTube's exact Filipino `Lumabas sa full screen` control](https://support.google.com/youtube/answer/72689?co=GENIE.Platform%3DDesktop&hl=fil). | verified |
| `F-fil-099` | `fil` | `tools.video.fullscreen` | media terminology / exact retention | `"Buong screen"` | `"Full screen"` | The current half-translation is unnatural and conflicts with the paired exit control. [YouTube's Filipino player](https://support.google.com/youtube/answer/72689?co=GENIE.Platform%3DDesktop&hl=fil) uses exact `Full screen`; the post-edit identity is explicitly classified as `R-fil-051`. | verified |
| `F-fil-100` | `fil` | `tools.embed.urlPlaceholder` | orthography / prospective aspect / caller fit | `"Mag-paste ng link na ie-embed…"` | `"Mag-paste ng link na i-e-embed…"` | The placeholder and accessible name describe the link that will be embedded, so the prospective form needs the repeated initial vowel and hyphenated boundary before the unchanged foreign root: `i-e-embed`. The [KWF Manwal sa Masinop na Pagsulat](https://kwf.gov.ph/wp-content/uploads/MMP_Full.pdf?AxCArs=PHIQUMr) §2.3 requires a vowel-initial root to repeat its first vowel and applies the rule even to an unrespelt foreign root. This is distinct from the locale's imperative or infinitive `i-embed`, and it matches both callers in `src/tools/link/embed/index.ts`. | verified |
| `F-nl-086` | `nl` | `tools.callout.emojiCategoryActivity` | category scope / number | `"Activiteit"` | `"Activiteiten"` | The heading groups many activities rather than naming one activity. The plural matches official Dutch emoji-gallery terminology and the collective/plural sibling categories. Sources: [Microsoft Support — Een emoji of GIF verzenden in Microsoft Teams (gratis)](https://support.microsoft.com/nl-NL/teams/free/chat-calling/send-an-emoji-or-gif-in-microsoft-teams-free). | verified |
| `F-nl-087` | `nl` | `tools.image.previewControls` | accessibility / specificity | `"Voorbeeldbediening"` | `"Regelaars voor afbeeldingsvoorbeeld"` | The accessible group name must identify both the controls and their image-preview scope. `Regelaars` and `afbeeldingsvoorbeeld` are attested Dutch product terms; the current compact compound is generic and drops the image object. Sources: [W3C WAI-ARIA Authoring Practices — Providing Accessible Names and Descriptions](https://www.w3.org/WAI/ARIA/apg/practices/names-and-descriptions/); [Apple Support NL — Finder on Mac Pro](https://support.apple.com/nl-nl/guide/mac-pro/apddf030866a/mac); [Apple Support NL — Belichtings- en kleurinstellingen aanpassen](https://support.apple.com/nl-nl/guide/iphone/-iphebbd067ce/ios); [Microsoft Support NL — Het formaat van het Microsoft SwiftKey-toetsenbord wijzigen](https://support.microsoft.com/nl-nl/swiftkey-keyboard/how-to-resize-microsoft-swiftkey-keyboard); [Google Photos Help NL — Foto’s en video’s verwijderen en herstellen](https://support.google.com/photos/answer/6128850?co=GENIE.Platform%3DAndroid&hl=nl). | verified |
| `F-nl-088` | `nl` | `tools.image.errorSourceOffline` | natural error copy | `"Het bronbestand is mogelijk verplaatst of offline."` | `"Het bronbestand is mogelijk verplaatst of niet beschikbaar."` | The caller only knows the remote source cannot be loaded; it does not establish a synchronized offline-file state. `niet beschikbaar` accurately describes the unavailable resource and is natural Dutch error copy. Sources: [Microsoft Support NL — Een verbindingsfout corrigeren](https://support.microsoft.com/nl-nl/excel/how-to-correct-a-connect-error); [Microsoft Support NL — De status Off-line bestand wordt onjuist weergegeven](https://support.microsoft.com/nl-nl/topic/de-status-off-line-bestand-wordt-onjuist-weergegeven-in-file-explorer-in-windows-3026cc25-2d68-1202-2d14-d20e63246a5a). | verified |
| `F-nl-089` | `nl` | `searchTerms.header` | search alias / domain terminology | `"koptekst"` | `"tussenkop"` | `koptekst` has the page-header sense in Dutch editor terminology, while this caller routes only to content heading blocks. `tussenkop` is a legitimate in-text heading term and adds a distinct route beside `title=titel` and `heading=kop`. The first-pass objection that `tussenkop` is narrower does not rescue the current wrong-domain page-header alias. Sources: [Notion Help NL — Basisprincipes voor schrijven en bewerken](https://www.notion.com/nl/help/writing-and-editing-basics); [Microsoft Support NL — Een kop- of voettekst invoegen](https://support.microsoft.com/nl-nl/word/training/insert-a-header-or-footer); [Onze Taal — Tussenkopjes (algemeen)](https://onzetaal.nl/taalloket/tussenkopjes-algemeen). | verified |
| `F-nl-090` | `nl` | `searchTerms.number` | search alias / editor terminology | `"nummer"` | `"nummering"` | `nummering` is the established Dutch editor feature/operation term for numbered lists; `nummer` names an individual number. The displayed Dutch title is `Genummerde lijst`, so a `nummer` query remains substring-covered after the alias changes. The replacement therefore adds the correct operation alias without removing the current query path. Sources: [LibreOffice Help NL — Nummering en nummeringsstijlen](https://help.libreoffice.org/latest/nl/text/swriter/guide/using_numbering.html); [LibreOffice Help NL — Nummering toevoegen](https://help.libreoffice.org/latest/nl/text/swriter/guide/using_numbered_lists2.html). | verified |
| `F-nl-091` | `nl` | `tools.colorPicker.defaultSwatchLabel` | grammar / dynamic label composition | `"{mode} {default}"` | `"{mode}: {default}"` | The live formatter currently emits bare noun sequences such as `Tekstkleur Standaard` and `Achtergrond Standaard`. A colon gives the stable label–value relation required across every mode without placeholder-dependent inflection. Official Dutch Google and Microsoft copy corroborates `Tekstkleur` and `Standaard`; the independent caller challenge kept the exact separator-only proposal. Sources: [Google Docs Editors Help — kleur wijzigen](https://support.google.com/docs/answer/13267978?hl=nl); [Microsoft Support — standaardtekstkleur wijzigen](https://support.microsoft.com/nl-nl/office/de-standaardtekstkleur-tekstkleur-wijzigen-in-word-59f83009-12c2-4feb-b548-93621dfe6f2f). | verified |
| `F-nl-092` | `nl` | `tools.colorPicker.colorSwatchLabel` | grammar / dynamic label composition | `"{mode} {color}"` | `"{mode}: {color}"` | The live formatter currently emits bare noun sequences such as `Tekstkleur Rood` and `Achtergrond Rood`; raw color placeholders cannot supply the adjective inflection that an unpunctuated Dutch phrase would require. The colon makes all nine values unambiguous across every live mode and matches official Dutch Adobe product copy such as `Tekstkleur: Bruin`. Source: [Adobe Muse reference](https://helpx.adobe.com/nl/pdf/muse_reference.pdf). | verified |
| `F-global-001` | all non-English | 77 changed English source keys | source dependency | Localized values have not been re-reviewed against the 70 corrected source values and seven new keys. | All 5,236 dependent values have a current reviewed disposition, and every required localized correction is applied. | All 77 dependencies were inspected in all 68 localized dictionaries against their callers or documented contracts. Executable emoji and movement matrices, exact placeholder and NFC checks, all 1,448 synchronized localized findings, the 1,743-case guideline contract, and the live 545-key checker verify the final state; complete locale passes remain separately required. | verified |
| `F-global-002` | all non-English | four expanded emoji category keys | source dependency / category scope / accessibility | The 68 localized dictionaries still use one-part labels for some or all of the newly expanded smileys-and-people, animals-and-nature, food-and-drink, and travel-and-places source categories. | Apply the independently reviewed native four-label matrix to all 68 localized dictionaries, retaining a current value only when it already expresses both scopes. | Three independent language-family reviews inspected all 272 visible and ARIA labels against runtime category contents, bundled Emoji Mart data, Unicode CLDR, and official Apple, Google, Microsoft, Android, and native-language product terminology. A fresh full Hebrew reread independently reopened only the `tools.callout.emojiCategoryPeople` cell from singular `סמיילי` to plural `סמיילים`; the revised executable matrix records 254 required corrections and 18 valid retentions. | verified |
| `F-global-003` | all non-English | tools.colorPicker.recentlyUsed localized labels | source dependency / missing key / hard-coded fallback / false friend | The committed recently-used color section had no localized dictionary key and fell back to raw English in every non-English locale; the first matrix also used Yiddish `לעצטנס געוויינט`, whose participle means “cried/wept,” not product “used.” | Add the independently reviewed context-aware label to all 68 localized dictionaries, use Yiddish `לעצטנס געניצט`, and require direct dictionary resolution in the caller. | Two context challenges corrected Norwegian plural agreement and completed the Burmese attributive phrase; a third independent challenge caught the Yiddish false friend and explicitly accepted the other 67 values. The corrected Yiddish expectation failed before remediation. The final 69/69 matrix cases, 59/59 caller cases, 87/87 scanner cases, live 546-key checker, and full guideline contract pass. | verified |
| `F-global-004` | all non-English | popover.search localized action placeholders | source dependency / caller context | All 68 localized values translated the old generic `Search` source and omitted the newly explicit action object. | Apply the independently reviewed action-oriented placeholder matrix to all 68 localized dictionaries, preserving native register and ellipsis. | The first full challenge corrected 23 register mismatches; a distinct second reviewer accepted all 68 corrected values, including explicit low-resource script-and-morphology checks. The final 69/69 matrix cases, all 2,237 guideline cases, i18n module regression, 87 scanner cases, and live 546-key/210-reference checker pass. | verified |
| `F-global-005` | all non-English | notifier.dismiss helper localization contract | dormant localization bypass / dependency injection | The exported dismiss-button helper is not currently used by production notifier rendering, but its built-in English lookup would bypass every localized dictionary if the internal helper were reused. | Keep the dormant helper source-safe by requiring any future caller to supply a localized accessible label instead of allowing the drawing utility to choose English. | An adversarial Bengali source review found the latent bypass and confirmed there is no current production caller. The helper-level regression failed with English `Dismiss`, then passed a Bengali label through unchanged after the helper began requiring injection and dropped its English-dictionary import; notifier-show tests continue to confirm that live toasts render no dismiss button. | verified |
| `F-global-006` | all non-English | tools.link.webLink catch-all labels | source dependency / caller scope / terminology | Sixty-seven localized labels still restricted the catch-all suggestion to a web page, while the first draft also preserved five weaker transliterated or non-native generic terms; Bosnian alone was already generic. | Apply the independently reviewed 68-locale generic-label matrix, including native Kannada `ಕೊಂಡಿ`, Sorani `بەستەر`, Malayalam `കണ്ണി`, locale-correct Nepali `लिङ्क`, and native Pashto `تړونی`. | Three disjoint family reviews covered 23+23+22 locales, and a distinct whole-matrix reviewer confirmed all 68 final values and all nine exact-English loanword retentions. The final fixture exactly matches the reviewed artifact at SHA-256 `7d489cef89d80cebd9557d0480600e0ab42d8db1a6bb2ec698bc472559fee614`; its coverage case and Bosnian passed red, the other 67 locale cases failed red, and all 69 dictionary cases, 76 caller cases, 2,543 guideline cases, and the live 546-key/208-reference checker pass after remediation. | verified |
| `F-global-007` | all non-English | detached editor UI direction contract | caller / portal ancestry / bidirectional layout / accessibility | Body- and Top-Layer-mounted tooltip, popover, and lightbox roots lose their owning editor ancestry; the isolation reset forces non-inline tooltip/popover direction to initial/LTR, while lightbox inherits the host body. Nested desktop submenus under an RTL inline popover are also reset to LTR. | On every open, resolve the effective owning editor direction and apply both semantic `dir` and inline-important CSS `direction` to every detached or reset UI root; refresh the tooltip singleton across mixed-direction editors and support explicit direction for virtual roots. | Two independent Chromium reproductions confirmed that the Persian dictionary and editor wrapper are correctly RTL while affected roots compute LTR; `dir` alone still loses to the reset. The frozen challenge identifies 25 direct and at least 59 built-in affected keys. Six regression tests failed before remediation. After the body-root fallback correction, a distinct reviewer found no blocker and passed 169/169 focused cases; the broader related unit gate passes 687/687, and Chromium passes the 29-test tooltip file with direct computed-direction verification. | verified |

| `F-global-008` | all non-English | drag move destination contract | caller / accessibility / move indexing / structural integrity | Drop previews announced a raw pre-removal boundary instead of the first moved block's final position, producing overstated or impossible values; multiple execution also returned the raw slot and misordered supported non-contiguous or variable-width nested groups. Invalid descendant and stale targets could still display indicators, and side-drop source filtering could detach nested children. | Resolve one move contract from the live flat array, explicit sources, physical carried footprint, logical ancestry, target, and edge; use its final first index for previews and results, anchor execution to the live target, preserve nested/non-contiguous order, validate indicators in every mode, and keep nested children attached during side drops. | The frozen Estonian caller challenge records six exact numeric scenarios. Red-first unit and integration cases cover formula, execution, lifecycle, staleness, duplicate, physical/logical descendant, indicator, and horizontal source-filter contracts. A distinct read-only reviewer found no blocker and independently passed the 132-case focused gate, scoped ESLint, full TypeScript, and whitespace checks. | verified |
| `F-global-009` | all non-English | tool API interpolation contract | caller / interpolation / public API / accessibility | The tool-facing API and per-tool namespace wrapper accept and forward only a dictionary key, so the live image, video, and audio callers can expose raw `{size}`, `{current}`, and `{total}` placeholders. | Accept optional `Record<string, string \| number>` interpolation variables in the public tool API and forward the same object unchanged through the API module and both namespace-wrapper branches; document and regression-test the contract. | Independent complete Dhivehi and Filipino audits found the same defect and an AST-closed caller review identified exactly four affected live calls. Three focused propagation assertions and one docs contract failed before remediation. After both boundaries began forwarding the identical object without changing one-argument calls, focused API/factory tests pass 19/19, docs API tests pass 59/59, four affected tool-family files pass 256/256, and the complete i18n gate passes 3,938/3,938. Type, scoped lint, translation, docs, and whitespace checks pass; distinct reviewer `root-dhivehi_postfix_first_blind` found no blocker or non-blocker and freshly passed the focused gate. | verified |

| `F-hy-070` | `hy` | `tools.callout.addEmoji` | source synchronization / icon terminology | `"Ավելացնել էմոջի"` | `"Ավելացնել պատկերակ"` | English deliberately broadened the outer callout action from “Add emoji” to “Add icon”; the live button opens the symbol picker, and Armenian siblings already say `Խմբագրել պատկերակը` and `Հեռացնել պատկերակը`. The final preserves the outer icon versus inner emoji distinction and follows the current Armenian government standard [`Icon` → `Պատկերակ`](https://standards.hightech.gov.am/%D5%BF%D5%A5%D6%80%D5%B4%D5%AB%D5%B6%D5%B6%D5%A5%D6%80%D5%AB-%D6%81%D5%A1%D5%B6%D5%AF/). | verified |

| `F-hu-005` | `hu` | `blockSettings.dragToMove` | native grammar and register | `"Húzza az áthelyezéshez"` | `"Húzással áthelyezheti a blokkot"` | The tooltip describes the gesture rather than an objectless command. “Húzással …” is idiomatic formal Hungarian and explicitly names the block being moved. | verified |
| `F-hu-006` | `hu` | `toolbox.addBelow` | native grammar and register | `"Kattintson az alá szúráshoz"` | `"Kattintással új blokkot szúrhat be alá"` | This is a gesture legend. The instrumental “Kattintással” and finite “szúrhat be” form a natural instruction and preserve insertion below the current block. | verified |

| `F-hu-099` | `hu` | `tools.bookmark.error` | semantic scope and product style | `"Az előnézet nem tölthető be"` | `"A hivatkozás előnézete nem tölthető be"` | The final restores the hivatkozás/beágyazás scope and uses a complete Hungarian loading, error, placeholder, or action label appropriate to the caller state. | verified |
| `F-hu-100` | `hu` | `tools.embed.empty` | semantic scope and product style | `"Illesszen be egy hivatkozást a beágyazáshoz"` | `"Nincs beágyazandó hivatkozás"` | The final restores the hivatkozás/beágyazás scope and uses a complete Hungarian loading, error, placeholder, or action label appropriate to the caller state. | verified |
| `F-hu-101` | `hu` | `tools.embed.captionPlaceholder` | terminology | `"Írjon képaláírást…"` | `"Írjon feliratot…"` | For audio/video/embed media, Hungarian “felirat” is the correct visible caption term; “képaláírás” is image-specific and “leírás” loses the caption role. | verified |
| `F-hu-102` | `hu` | `tools.embed.urlSubmit` | semantic scope and product style | `"Link beágyazása"` | `"Hivatkozás beágyazása"` | The final restores the hivatkozás/beágyazás scope and uses a complete Hungarian loading, error, placeholder, or action label appropriate to the caller state. | verified |
| `F-hu-103` | `hu` | `tools.embed.invalidUrl` | semantic scope and product style | `"Ez a link nem ágyazható be"` | `"Ez a hivatkozás nem ágyazható be"` | The final restores the hivatkozás/beágyazás scope and uses a complete Hungarian loading, error, placeholder, or action label appropriate to the caller state. | verified |
| `F-hu-104` | `hu` | `tools.linkPaste.embed` | semantic scope and product style | `"Beágyazás"` | `"Beágyazás létrehozása"` | The final restores the hivatkozás/beágyazás scope and uses a complete Hungarian loading, error, placeholder, or action label appropriate to the caller state. | verified |
| `F-hu-105` | `hu` | `notifier.dismiss` | semantic scope and product style | `"Elvetés"` | `"Bezárás"` | Independent review confirms that “Bezárás” preserves English “Dismiss” for the notification action button while correcting the semantic or grammatical weakness of “Elvetés”. | verified |
| `F-hu-106` | `hu` | `tools.video.seek` | terminology | `"Tekerés"` | `"Lejátszási pozíció"` | The final “Lejátszási pozíció” preserves the media caller’s exact action or accessible name in idiomatic Hungarian; current “Tekerés” is narrower, less precise, or uses inconsistent product terminology. | verified |
| `F-hu-107` | `hu` | `tools.video.seekValueText` | accessibility caller fit | `"{current} / {total}"` | `"{current}, összesen {total}"` | The final “{current}, összesen {total}” preserves the media caller’s exact action or accessible name in idiomatic Hungarian; current “{current} / {total}” is narrower, less precise, or uses inconsistent product terminology. | verified |
| `F-hu-108` | `hu` | `tools.video.toggleTimeDisplay` | consistency and clarity | `"Időkijelzés váltása"` | `"Váltás az eltelt és a hátralévő idő között"` | The final “Váltás az eltelt és a hátralévő idő között” preserves the media caller’s exact action or accessible name in idiomatic Hungarian; current “Időkijelzés váltása” is narrower, less precise, or uses inconsistent product terminology. | verified |
| `F-hu-109` | `hu` | `tools.video.fullscreenExit` | semantic scope and product style | `"Kilépés a teljes képernyőből"` | `"Kilépés a teljes képernyős módból"` | The final “Kilépés a teljes képernyős módból” preserves the media caller’s exact action or accessible name in idiomatic Hungarian; current “Kilépés a teljes képernyőből” is narrower, less precise, or uses inconsistent product terminology. | verified |
| `F-hu-110` | `hu` | `tools.video.speedPresets` | terminology | `"Sebesség-előbeállítások"` | `"Előre beállított sebességek"` | The final “Előre beállított sebességek” preserves the media caller’s exact action or accessible name in idiomatic Hungarian; current “Sebesség-előbeállítások” is narrower, less precise, or uses inconsistent product terminology. | verified |
| `F-hu-111` | `hu` | `tools.video.ctxCopyUrl` | consistency and clarity | `"Videó URL másolása"` | `"Videó URL-címének másolása"` | The context-menu noun phrase naturally omits an unnecessary article while using established “URL-cím” terminology. | verified |
| `F-hu-112` | `hu` | `tools.video.ctxCopyUrlAtTime` | consistency and clarity | `"Videó URL másolása az aktuális időpontnál"` | `"Videó URL-címének másolása az aktuális időponttól"` | The context-menu label preserves the source-time meaning with “az aktuális időponttól” and the same concise URL-cím construction. | verified |
| `F-hu-113` | `hu` | `tools.video.ctxStats` | terminology | `"Részletes statisztika"` | `"Lejátszási statisztikák"` | The final “Lejátszási statisztikák” preserves the media caller’s exact action or accessible name in idiomatic Hungarian; current “Részletes statisztika” is narrower, less precise, or uses inconsistent product terminology. | verified |
| `F-hu-114` | `hu` | `tools.callout.emojiSearchResults` | semantic scope and product style | `"{count} emodzsi található"` | `"{count} emoji található"` | The final follows current Hungarian product usage of “emoji/emojik”, preserves the picker action or count, and avoids the inconsistent “emodzsi” spelling. | verified |
| `F-hu-115` | `hu` | `tools.table.compactText` | terminology / density semantics | `"Tömör szöveg"` | `"Kompakt szöveg"` | The visible table text-size choice controls compact display density; `Tömör` normally characterizes concise content rather than a visual size mode. `Kompakt` is the established counterpart to the existing `Kényelmes szöveg`, matching the paired density labels used by [Gmail](https://support.google.com/mail/answer/5900?co=GENIE.Platform%3DDesktop&hl=hu) and [Microsoft Teams](https://support.microsoft.com/hu-HU/teams/chat/change-the-spacing-of-your-chat-messages-in-microsoft-teams). | verified |
| `F-hu-116` | `hu` | `a11y.blocksMoved` | accessibility / spoken grammar / count neutrality | `"{count} blokk áthelyezve a(z) {position}. pozícióba"` | `"{count} blokk áthelyezve. Új pozíció: {position}."` | The assertive multi-block drop announcement receives `count >= 2` and the first moved block’s new one-based position. Hungarian keeps `blokk` singular after a cardinal, while the two-clause final removes speech-hostile written `a(z)`, preserves placeholder order, and matches the corrected single-block family. [Google Accessibility explains that screen-reader punctuation output is configurable](https://support.google.com/accessibility/answer/90559?hl=hu). | verified |
| `F-hu-117` | `hu` | `a11y.navigationPosition` | accessibility / spoken numeric relation | `"{tool}, {position}/{total}"` | `"{tool}, {position}. pozíció, összesen {total}"` | This throttled polite live-region message announces the localized tool, one-based position, and current total. Lexical labels avoid relying on slash pronunciation, preserve all placeholders in caller order, and align with the existing Hungarian `movedUp`, `movedDown`, and seek-value wording. [Microsoft’s Hungarian screen-reader guidance describes hearing a task’s new position](https://support.microsoft.com/hu-HU/accessibility/todo/use-a-screen-reader-to-move-tasks-between-or-within-lists-in-to-do). | verified |

| `F-id-005` | `id` | `toolbox.addBelow` | grammar | `"Klik untuk tambah di bawah"` | `"Klik untuk menambahkan di bawah"` | Sesudah “untuk”, verba berimbuhan “menambahkan” lebih alami untuk instruksi antarmuka daripada bentuk pangkas “tambah”. Baris ini menjadi baris pertama tooltip tombol plus dan menjelaskan hasil klik biasa: menambahkan blok di bawah. [Sumber primer](https://support.microsoft.com/id-id/office/menambahkan-mengedit-atau-menghapus-tempat-penampung-pada-tata-letak-slide-a8d93d28-66cb-43fd-9f9d-e12d0a7a1f06). | verified |
| `F-id-006` | `id` | `toolbox.optionAddAbove` | grammar | `"⌥-klik untuk tambah di atas"` | `"⌥-klik untuk menambahkan di atas"` | Nama tombol dan arah tetap dipertahankan; verba “menambahkan” melengkapi konstruksi “untuk” secara alami. Tooltip memilih instruksi Option-click pada platform non-Windows untuk menambahkan blok di atas. [Sumber primer](https://support.microsoft.com/id-id/office/menambahkan-mengedit-atau-menghapus-tempat-penampung-pada-tata-letak-slide-a8d93d28-66cb-43fd-9f9d-e12d0a7a1f06). | verified |
| `F-id-007` | `id` | `toolbox.ctrlAddAbove` | grammar | `"Ctrl-klik untuk tambah di atas"` | `"Ctrl-klik untuk menambahkan di atas"` | Nama tombol dan arah tetap dipertahankan; verba “menambahkan” melengkapi konstruksi “untuk” secara alami. Tooltip memilih instruksi Ctrl-click pada Windows untuk menambahkan blok di atas. [Sumber primer](https://support.microsoft.com/id-id/office/menambahkan-mengedit-atau-menghapus-tempat-penampung-pada-tata-letak-slide-a8d93d28-66cb-43fd-9f9d-e12d0a7a1f06). | verified |
| `F-id-008` | `id` | `tools.table.clearSelection` | caller-semantic | `"Hapus"` | `"Kosongkan isi"` | Pada pilihan sel tabel, “Hapus” ambigu dengan penghapusan baris/kolom; “Kosongkan isi” menyatakan bahwa hanya isi sel yang dibersihkan. Perintah dijalankan pada seleksi sel tabel; label harus membedakan pengosongan isi dari penghapusan baris atau kolom. [Sumber primer](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/style-guide/global-communications/writing-tips). | verified |
| `F-id-009` | `id` | `tools.table.placement` | terminology | `"Penempatan"` | `"Perataan"` | Kontrol ini mengatur alignment isi sel, bukan penempatan objek; “Perataan” juga konsisten dengan kontrol alignment media. Teks ditampilkan dalam pemilih perataan sel tabel; istilah dan posisi harus konsisten sebagai satu sistem opsi. [Sumber primer](https://support.microsoft.com/id-id/office/security-privacy/set-or-change-table-properties). | verified |
| `F-id-010` | `id` | `tools.table.placementTopLeft` | capitalization | `"Kiri Atas"` | `"Kiri atas"` | Label UI bahasa Indonesia memakai kapitalisasi kalimat; kata kedua bukan nama diri. Teks ditampilkan dalam pemilih perataan sel tabel; istilah dan posisi harus konsisten sebagai satu sistem opsi. [Sumber primer](https://learn.microsoft.com/id-id/style-guide/text-formatting/using-type/use-sentence-style-capitalization). | verified |
| `F-id-011` | `id` | `tools.table.placementTopCenter` | capitalization | `"Tengah Atas"` | `"Tengah atas"` | Label UI bahasa Indonesia memakai kapitalisasi kalimat; kata kedua bukan nama diri. [Sumber primer](https://learn.microsoft.com/id-id/style-guide/text-formatting/using-type/use-sentence-style-capitalization). | verified |

Teks ditampilkan dalam pemilih perataan sel tabel; istilah dan posisi harus konsisten sebagai satu sistem opsi. Teks ditampilkan dalam pemilih perataan sel tabel; istilah dan posisi harus konsisten sebagai satu sistem opsi. Teks ditampilkan dalam pemilih perataan sel tabel; istilah dan posisi harus konsisten sebagai satu sistem opsi. Teks ditampilkan dalam pemilih perataan sel tabel; istilah dan posisi harus konsisten sebagai satu sistem opsi. [Sumber primer](https://learn.microsoft.com/id-id/style-guide/text-formatting/using-type/use-sentence-style-capitalization). | verified |
| `F-id-017` | `id` | `tools.table.placementBottomRight` | capitalization | `"Kanan Bawah"` | `"Kanan bawah"` | Label UI bahasa Indonesia memakai kapitalisasi kalimat; kata kedua bukan nama diri. Teks ditampilkan dalam pemilih perataan sel tabel; istilah dan posisi harus konsisten sebagai satu sistem opsi. [Sumber primer](https://learn.microsoft.com/id-id/style-guide/text-formatting/using-type/use-sentence-style-capitalization). | verified |
| `F-id-018` | `id` | `a11y.dragHandle` | accessibility-clarity | `"Seret untuk memindahkan blok atau klik untuk menu"` | `"Seret untuk memindahkan blok atau klik untuk membuka menu"` | Menambahkan verba “membuka” membuat akibat klik eksplisit bagi pengguna pembaca layar; “klik untuk menu” terdengar terpotong. Teks ini adalah nama aksesibel pegangan blok yang memiliki dua tindakan berbeda: seret untuk memindahkan dan klik untuk membuka menu. [Sumber primer](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/style-guide/global-communications/writing-tips). | verified |
| `F-id-019` | `id` | `a11y.blockDuplicated` | accessibility-register | `"Blok diduplikasi di posisi {position} dari {total}"` | `"Blok digandakan di posisi {position} dari {total}"` | “Digandakan” menyampaikan hasil tindakan duplicate dengan bahasa Indonesia yang lebih alami daripada serapan “diduplikasi”, tanpa mengubah placeholder. Pesan diumumkan secara assertive setelah satu blok selesai digandakan dan menyertakan posisi serta total blok. [Sumber primer](https://support.google.com/docs/answer/2839737?hl=id). | verified |
| `F-id-020` | `id` | `a11y.blocksDuplicated` | accessibility-register | `"{count} blok diduplikasi mulai dari posisi {position}"` | `"{count} blok digandakan mulai dari posisi {position}"` | “Digandakan” adalah bentuk pasif Indonesia yang alami untuk duplicate; urutan dan himpunan placeholder tetap sama. Pesan diumumkan secara assertive setelah beberapa blok digandakan dan menyebut jumlah serta posisi awal. [Sumber primer](https://support.google.com/docs/answer/2839737?hl=id). | verified |
| `F-id-021` | `id` | `a11y.searchResults` | accessibility | `"{count} hasil"` | `"Hasil pencarian: {count}"` | Pengumuman pembaca layar perlu menyebut konteks pencarian; “{count} hasil” saja ambigu. Status hasil pencarian toolbox diumumkan kepada teknologi bantu dan harus menyebut hasil serta jumlahnya. [Sumber primer](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/style-guide/global-communications/writing-tips). | verified |
| `F-id-022` | `id` | `a11y.allBlocksSelected` | accessibility | `"Semua blok dipilih, {count} blok"` | `"Semua blok dipilih. Total: {count}"` | Dua kalimat singkat mempertahankan status dan label total dengan jeda yang jelas bagi pembaca layar. Pengumuman pemilihan semua blok harus menyampaikan keadaan dan jumlah total secara eksplisit. [Sumber primer](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/style-guide/global-communications/writing-tips). | verified |
| `F-id-023` | `id` | `a11y.navigationModeEntered` | spelling | `"Mode navigasi. Gunakan tombol panah untuk berpindah antar blok, Enter untuk mengedit, Escape untuk keluar."` | `"Mode navigasi. Gunakan tombol panah untuk berpindah antarblok, Enter untuk mengedit, dan Escape untuk keluar."` | Bentuk terikat “antar-” dirangkai dengan nomina menjadi “antarblok”; instruksi tombol dan urutannya tidak berubah. Pengumuman assertive menjelaskan perubahan mode keyboard dan seluruh cara bergerak, mengedit, serta keluar. [Sumber primer](https://support.google.com/docs/answer/4492226?hl=id). | verified |
| `F-id-024` | `id` | `searchTerms.heading` | semantic | `"kepala"` | `"judul bagian"` | Heading dokumen adalah “judul bagian”, bukan “kepala”; istilah kini tetap berguna sebagai kata pencarian. Istilah dipakai sebagai alias pencarian agar pengguna yang mencari konsep heading menemukan alat yang tepat. [Sumber primer](https://support.google.com/docs/answer/1632201?hl=id-ID). | verified |
| `F-id-025` | `id` | `tools.callout.addEmoji` | source-fidelity | `"Tambah emoji"` | `"Tambah ikon"` | Salinan Inggris dan tindakan yang terlihat menyebut ikon; “emoji” terlalu menyempitkan arti label. Teks dipakai oleh kontrol ikon, pencarian emoji, kategori, atau warna callout; label harus menamai tindakan atau objek yang sebenarnya. [Sumber primer](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/style-guide/global-communications/writing-tips). | verified |
| `F-id-026` | `id` | `tools.callout.filterEmojis` | accessibility | `"Cari…"` | `"Cari emoji…"` | Placeholder sekaligus label pencarian perlu menyebut objek pencarian, bukan hanya “Cari”. Teks dipakai oleh kontrol ikon, pencarian emoji, kategori, atau warna callout; label harus menamai tindakan atau objek yang sebenarnya. [Sumber primer](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/style-guide/global-communications/writing-tips). | verified |
| `F-id-027` | `id` | `tools.callout.noEmojisFound` | naturalness | `"Tidak ada emoji ditemukan"` | `"Emoji tidak ditemukan"` | Susunan ini lebih langsung dan alami daripada konstruksi pasif eksistensial “Tidak ada emoji ditemukan”. Teks dipakai oleh kontrol ikon, pencarian emoji, kategori, atau warna callout; label harus menamai tindakan atau objek yang sebenarnya. [Sumber primer](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/style-guide/global-communications/writing-tips). | verified |
| `F-id-028` | `id` | `tools.callout.pickRandom` | accessibility | `"Acak"` | `"Pilih emoji acak"` | Label tombol ikon harus menjelaskan hasil tindakan; “Acak” saja tidak menyebut apa yang dipilih. Teks dipakai oleh kontrol ikon, pencarian emoji, kategori, atau warna callout; label harus menamai tindakan atau objek yang sebenarnya. [Sumber primer](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/style-guide/global-communications/writing-tips). | verified |
| `F-id-029` | `id` | `tools.callout.emojiCategoryPeople` | terminology | `"Smiley dan orang"` | `"Wajah tersenyum dan orang"` | “Wajah tersenyum” adalah padanan Indonesia yang jelas; “Smiley” tidak perlu dipertahankan dalam label kategori. Teks dipakai oleh kontrol ikon, pencarian emoji, kategori, atau warna callout; label harus menamai tindakan atau objek yang sebenarnya. [Sumber primer](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/style-guide/global-communications/writing-tips). | verified |
| `F-id-030` | `id` | `tools.callout.colorBrown` | spelling | `"Coklat"` | `"Cokelat"` | “Cokelat” ialah bentuk baku dan sudah dipakai oleh swatch cokelat lain dalam katalog yang sama. Tidak ada lookup produksi langsung untuk kunci lama ini: kunci tetap dapat diselesaikan melalui namespace `tools.callout` karena callout terdaftar, sedangkan pemilih bersama yang aktif merender `tools.colorPicker.color.brown`. [Sumber primer](https://repositori.kemendikdasmen.go.id/31401/1/EDISI_21_2018.pdf). | verified |
| `F-id-031` | `id` | `tools.code.searchLanguage` | punctuation | `"Cari bahasa..."` | `"Cari bahasa…"` | Karakter elipsis tunggal mengikuti salinan sumber dan pola placeholder katalog, bukan tiga titik ASCII. Placeholder bidang pencarian bahasa kode harus mempertahankan jeda elipsis dan instruksi singkat. [Sumber primer](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/style-guide/global-communications/writing-tips). | verified |
| `F-id-032` | `id` | `blockSettings.copyLinkSuccess` | terminology | `"Tautan disalin ke clipboard"` | `"Tautan disalin ke papan klip"` | “Papan klip” ialah padanan Indonesia dan sudah dipakai pada notifikasi salin tautan lain. Toast konfirmasi muncul setelah URL blok berhasil disalin ke clipboard. [Sumber primer](https://support.microsoft.com/id-ID/Word/copy-and-paste-using-the-office-clipboard). | verified |
| `F-id-033` | `id` | `tools.link.linkTitle` | semantic | `"Judul tautan"` | `"Teks tautan"` | Field ini menyunting teks tampilan tautan, bukan judul tautan. Label menamai teks tampilan sebuah tautan, bukan judul dokumen tujuan. [Sumber primer](https://support.microsoft.com/id-id/office/menambahkan-konten-dan-tautan-yang-mudah-diakses-ke-situs-sharepoint-online-dc34fac7-32d7-4dcf-b694-2cc6115ac8b9). | verified |
| `F-id-034` | `id` | `tools.image.altDescription` | accessibility-fidelity | `"Tambahkan teks alternatif untuk menjelaskan gambar ini. Ini membuat halaman lebih mudah diakses oleh pengguna dengan gangguan penglihatan atau tunanetra."` | `"Jelaskan gambar ini bagi orang yang tidak dapat melihatnya."` | Padanan ringkas mempertahankan tujuan aksesibilitas tanpa menambah dua kategori pengguna yang tidak ada pada sumber. Deskripsi pada popover alt text menjelaskan tujuan aksesibilitas kepada penulis konten. [Sumber primer](https://support.microsoft.com/id-ID/accessibility/office-accessibility/add-alternative-text-to-a-shape-picture-chart-smartart-graphic-or-other-object). | verified |
| `F-id-035` | `id` | `tools.image.errorUploadFailedTitle` | consistency | `"Unggah gagal"` | `"Unggahan gagal"` | Sebagai judul status kesalahan, frasa nomina ini alami dan konsisten dengan pesan upload gagal lain. Teks adalah judul atau detail keadaan galat pemuatan gambar dan harus mencerminkan kegagalan sebenarnya. [Sumber primer](https://support.microsoft.com/id-id/office/saya-mendapatkan-kesalahan-unggahan-gagal-atau-tidak-dapat-menyimpan-secara-otomatis-saat-mengedit-file-office-93a14d34-88e3-4a91-9eef-58cc541d31f8). | verified |
| `F-id-036` | `id` | `tools.image.errorDefaultMessage` | source-fidelity | `"URL mengembalikan kesalahan. Coba sumber lain atau unggah ulang berkas."` | `"Gambar tidak dapat dimuat dari URL ini. [Sumber primer](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/style-guide/global-communications/writing-tips). | verified |

| `F-id-059` | `id` | `tools.video.speedIncrease` | naturalness | `"Tambah kecepatan pemutaran"` | `"Tingkatkan kecepatan pemutaran"` | “Tingkatkan” ialah verba idiomatis untuk menaikkan nilai; “Tambah kecepatan” terasa mekanis. ## Exact-English Retentions

Record every non-English value that is exactly identical to English. The only
allowed categories are `universal notation`, `product-brand`, `acronym`,
`established cognate`, and `established loanword`. Similar spelling alone is
not a justification; the source must support normal unchanged use in the
locale and UI context.

| Retention ID | Locale | Key | Category | Justification | Source |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `R-<locale>-NNN` | `<locale>` | `<key>` | category | justification | source |
| `R-cs-012` | `cs` | `notifier.ok` | established loanword | `OK` is the conventional unchanged Czech confirmation-button label. | [LibreOffice Czech Help — dialog buttons](https://help.libreoffice.org/latest/cs/text/shared/optionen/01000000.html) |
| `R-bg-001` | `bg` | `blockSettings.menuShortcutMac` | universal notation | `⌘/` is macOS shortcut notation rather than English prose; Bulgarian Apple guidance retains symbolic modifier notation. | [Apple — Клавишни комбинации](https://support.apple.com/bg-bg/126616) |
| `R-bg-002` | `bg` | `blockSettings.menuShortcutWin` | universal notation | `Ctrl+/` is Windows shortcut notation rather than translatable prose; Bulgarian Microsoft guidance retains `Ctrl` in key combinations. | [Microsoft — Клавишни комбинации в Windows](https://support.microsoft.com/bg-bg/windows/%D0%BA%D0%BB%D0%B0%D0%B2%D0%B8%D1%88%D0%BD%D0%B8-%D0%BA%D0%BE%D0%BC%D0%B1%D0%B8%D0%BD%D0%B0%D1%86%D0%B8%D0%B8-%D0%B2-windows-dcc61a57-8ff0-cffe-9796-cb9706c75eec) |
| `R-bg-003` | `bg` | `tools.image.altButton` | acronym | `Alt` is the conventional compact alternative-text control label; the surrounding Bulgarian dialog supplies the full localized concept. | [Microsoft — Алтернативен текст](https://support.microsoft.com/bg-bg/accessibility/office-accessibility/everything-you-need-to-know-to-write-effective-alt-text) |
| `R-bg-004` | `bg` | `tools.image.cropRatio1to1` | universal notation | `1:1` is language-independent aspect-ratio notation used unchanged in Bulgarian media interfaces. | [Apple — Промяна на пропорциите](https://support.apple.com/bg-bg/guide/iphone/iph3dc593597/26/ios/26) |
| `R-bg-005` | `bg` | `tools.image.cropRatio4to3` | universal notation | `4:3` is language-independent aspect-ratio notation used unchanged in Bulgarian media interfaces. | [Apple — Промяна на пропорциите](https://support.apple.com/bg-bg/guide/iphone/iph3dc593597/26/ios/26) |
| `R-bg-006` | `bg` | `tools.image.cropRatio16to9` | universal notation | `16:9` is language-independent aspect-ratio notation used unchanged in Bulgarian media interfaces. | [Apple — Промяна на пропорциите](https://support.apple.com/bg-bg/guide/iphone/iph3dc593597/26/ios/26) |
